calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Cindy Lee, counsel for plaintiff William V. Prieur and Joanne A. Prieur Co-Trustees for the Prieur Family 2001 Trust; plaintiff William V. Preiur is present; Charles C. Huse, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant Douglas A. Matley, who is also present.

Settlement conference is held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is not filed with the Court this day. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
